How to Use Revoicer

A 5 steps guide covering the workflow on revoicer.app.

1
Step 1. Login Page

this is login page. You have to put the email address, password, click that I am not a robot check box and then click login.

https://revoicer.app/user/login
2
And this is the user dashboard.

Once you are on this page, delete all the existing text in the box. Then paste the text you want to generate voice from, and click it. That's it!

https://revoicer.app/speak
3
You will see this when your audio is being generated.

you will see this you will see this box while the audio is being generated

https://revoicer.app/speak
4
Your audio is ready.

When you see this box, it means the audio has been created. Click OK.

https://revoicer.app/speak
5
You can play your audio from here.

The first one is your audio.. Click the PLAY button to play the audio.

https://revoicer.app/speak
